completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation-requirements.csv; backend row matched Python FastMCP server
Classified as monolith, 1 part, project_type=backend, Python 3.12+/FastMCP + TypeScript code_api submodule
Existing docs inventory: 7 generated (prior scan) + 5 preserved human-authored + HTML Pages site
Tech stack: Python 3.12+ (bumped from 3.10+), FastMCP ≥2.14.0, httpx ≥0.28, Pydantic ≥2.12, + TypeScript 5.3 Node 20
Exhaustive scan via 4 parallel Explore agents: 41 Python source files + 17 TypeScript files + 23 test files; catalogued 129 MCP tools + 3 resources + 1 prompt
source-tree-analysis.md rewritten with 23 tool modules + code_api TS submodule + tests; accurate file names (removed stale other_tools.py reference)
Dev + deployment info extracted: ~22 env vars from env.template, 9 CI workflows, Dockerfile python:3.12-slim + uv + non-root + HEALTHCHECK
architecture.md rewritten: layered + registrar pattern, single HTTP choke point, component details, TS submodule integration, security controls, 13 sections
Supporting docs rewritten: project-overview.md, api-contracts.md (all 129 tools catalogued), development-guide.md (TDD rules, common tasks), deployment-guide.md (PyPI/Docker/Registry flow)
Master index.md generated with AI-retrieval-first structure, quick reference, getting started per persona, link to all generated + preserved docs
Validation complete: no _(To be generated)_ or fuzzy incomplete markers found; all 7 generated files verified present and non-empty
